_meta.description: Drill Class x Tier matrix. Class and Tier are INDEPENDENT — any class can be any tier. Upgrade Templates raise tier and fully restore durability. Legendary is the ceiling. No movement weight penalty.
_meta.status: PLACEHOLDER — all numbers TBD pending balance pass

fields.dig_time_mult: multiplier on base dig time (lower = faster). Per terrain effectiveness lives in terrain_stats.json
fields.durability: number of tile-breaks before the drill is consumed/needs upgrade
fields.spawn_weight: relative class spawn weight; CURRENT VALUES INCOMPLETE (sum != 100)

Thermal.role: TBD — heat-based, strong vs certain terrain

Resonance.role: TBD — vibration-based, strong vs dense terrain
